BHS Class 91 Set Dashboard

Manage the alumni association in one place.

For God and Truth

BHS Class 91 Set is the official alumni platform for students admitted into Baptist High School in 1985 and completed studies in 1991. It helps manage members, dues, welfare, contributions, attendance, meeting minutes, decisions, follow-ups, events, birthdays, policies, hosts, venues and reports.
